positive: A whimsical, stylized illustration of a celestial cityscape viewed from above. The scene features glowing crescent moons, constellations forming geometric patterns, and stylized flying hot air balloons carrying silhouetted figures. The architecture of the city is drawn in Art Nouveau and Art Deco fusion styles, composed of smooth curves, repeating arches, and glowing stained-glass accents. Deep indigo and sapphire blues dominate the background, contrasted with metallic gold and soft cyan accents for light and energy sources. Strong linework, clean vector style, high contrast, suitable for direct-to-garment printing, full symmetrical composition, cinematic lighting, vaporwave aesthetic.
